# Figure Description: Document Page from Report 36572

## Figure Type

This is a **catalogue/inventory table** (описание чертежей / list of drawings/figures), specifically the final page of a numbered list of graphical attachments (чертежи) accompanying the geological-geophysical report. It is an administrative/bibliographic document, not a scientific figure itself. It includes a stamp and handwritten summary at the bottom confirming the total count.

---

## Coverage and Subject

The page lists **figures numbered 40–47** (internal numbers I03–I10) from the report's graphical appendix. The subjects covered include:

- **Geological cross-sections** (скважины / boreholes)
- **Structural maps** of the Caledonian basement of the western part of the **Teniz Depression (Тенизская впадина)**
- **Age-position diagrams** of mineral deposits (полезные ископаемые)
- **Geological map** of the **Shabdarskaya structure (Шабдарская структура)** at 1:50,000
- **Residual anomaly map (карта остаточных аномалий Δg)** covering map sheets including **N-42-137, 138, 139, 140, 141; M-42-3; and numerous sub-sheets** at 1:500,000
- **Isodepth map (схема изоглубин)** to the reference reflecting horizon **T₃** covering sheets **N-42-126, 128, 129, 137, 138, 139, 140, 141; M-42-3; sub-sheets VII, VIII, IX; 51, 52, 64** at 1:500,000
- **Interpretation profile location map** at 1:500,000
- **Results of quantitative interpretation of graphs along interpretation profiles** at 1:200,000

---

## Key Content

The table is organized in **7 columns** (numbered 1–7 in the header row):

| Col | Content |
|-----|---------|
| 1 | Sequential figure number (40–47) |
| 2 | Internal code number (I03–I10) |
| 3 | Title/description of the figure |
| 4 | Scale |
| 5 | Number of sheets/copies (mostly "I", one entry is "7") |
| 6 | Security classification (all: **не секретно** = not secret) |
| 7 | Material type |

**Material types** listed:
- **Светочувствительная** (photosensitive/blueprint paper) — for items I03 and I10
- **Карт. бумага** (map/cartographic paper) — for items I04–I09

**Notable entries:**
- Figure 44 (I07): Residual Bouguer anomaly map (Δg) — the most spatially extensive figure, covering a very large number of map sub-sheets, suggesting a regional gravity interpretation
- Figure 45 (I08): Isodepth map to seismic horizon T₃ — key structural map for depth to basement or a key reflector
- Figure 47 (I10): 7 sheets of quantitative interpretation results — the most voluminous single entry, indicating detailed 1D/2D modeling along multiple seismic/gravity profiles

**Bottom summary (handwritten):**
> *Всего 47 чертежей на 53 листах. Секретных нет. Составил Глухов.*
> ("Total 47 drawings on 53 sheets. None are secret. Compiled by Glukhov.")

A **round official stamp** is affixed, consistent with Soviet geological archive practice (likely from **ЦГФ** — Central Geological Fund, or a regional equivalent).
